label: 140_ibf_mas_talent_singapore
description: The Monetary Authority of Singapore and the Institute of Banking and Finance focus on training and retaining local talent to support Singapore's role as an international financial center. Key figures like Ravi Menon emphasize workforce readiness for global finance.
